name: premium
description: Luxury packaging and clean studio presentation with gold foil details and elevated merch presentation. This mood makes GAIA Print products feel like collectibles — premium sustainable goods worth displaying, not just wearing.

style.lighting: clean studio three-point | subtle gold accent lighting | soft even product light
style.color_grade: clean neutrals with gold accents | deep forest green and cream | premium matte finish
style.camera: clean product hero shot | detail macro on foil and texture | slow reveal unboxing
style.composition: centered product with breathing room | premium flat lay arrangement | unboxing sequence
style.props: tissue paper wrapping, gold foil stickers, branded box, premium hangtag, kraft paper, wax seal

copy_tone: Elevated and intentional. Every word feels considered. Uses language like 'crafted,' 'limited,' 'curated collection.' Signals value through restraint. Less is more.

music.mood: minimal electronic, luxury brand ambient, clean beats

example_prompt_fragment: A premium flat lay product shot of a folded GAIA Print tee in deep forest green on kraft tissue paper, gold foil brand sticker, clean studio lighting on a cream marble surface, branded box partially open revealing the product, gold accent details catching the light, premium neutral color palette, luxury product photography
